howItWorks.intro: This baby formula cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Daily Formula
rules.formula: Daily oz = oz per feeding × feedings per day
rules.explanation: Total daily consumption from feeding schedule.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much formula does a baby need?
faq.a: Roughly 2.5 oz per pound of body weight per day, usually 24-32 oz total.
Store-brand powder is most economical, meeting the same FDA nutritional standards.
